name: NBHD Site Publishing
description: Publish portfolio images to the subscriber's own website (Azure Blob + Cosmos DB) using the tenant's managed identity.

cosmosEndpoint.description: Cosmos DB account endpoint URL that the live site reads from.

cosmosContainer.description: Cosmos container name the site reads (e.g. Portfolio).

blobAccount.description: Storage account name (no URL, e.g. kihokoblob).

blobContainer.description: Blob container name for image files (e.g. media).

blobPathPrefix.description: Optional blob path prefix for uploads. Default: projects/portfolio
